title: Light Show-off Peruvian Parmigiano-Reggiano Stir-fry
description: This buttery, light Peruvian dish features a blend of low-fat-friendly ingredients including Parmigiano-Reggiano and is perfect for showcasing your culinary skills with its vibrant presentation.

ingredients.name: Broccoli florets
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality, fresh broccoli for best results

ingredients.name: Bamboo shoots
ingredients.notes: Fresh bamboo shoots or jarred, drained and rinsed

ingredients.name: Pepper Jack cheese
ingredients.notes: For grating and adding to the stir-fry for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Red bell pepper slices
ingredients.notes: Choose sweet, medium-sized red peppers for a milder taste

ingredients.name: Green onions (scallions)
ingredients.notes: Chopped green part only, finely chopped for added color and flavor

ingredients.name: Red wine vinegar
ingredients.notes: Any type of red wine vinegar, to taste

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Extra virgin olive oil for sautéing and topping dishes

instructions: Preheat your oven to broil. Season the Bamboo shoots with a pinch of salt.
Wash and cut broccoli into small florets, removing any tough stems.
In a large bowl, combine the grated Peru Parmesan Cheese, chopped Green onions, and Pepper Jack cheese.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add half of the bamboo shoots and cook until lightly browned.
Add broccoli to the pan and stir gently for about 2 minutes or until slightly wilted but still crisp.
Drizzle with red wine vinegar, pour remaining olive oil over the vegetables, and toss everything together for another minute.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil. Broil on high for 3-4 minutes, watching closely to prevent burning.
Finish by topping with the grated Peru Parmesan Cheese just before serving to enhance its flavor and appearance.
